meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use an Antigravity project template and overcome a lack of portfolio. A professional guide for founders to build, ship, and scale fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth; founders don't need a gallery of old work, they need a single, high-converting product that proves value. By leveraging an Antigravity project template with Claude Code, you can scaffold a production-ready, revenue-generating SaaS in hours, demonstrating immediate technical authority and market viability.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the founder's journey is that nobody cares about your resume; they care about your output. You are currently trapped in the 'no portfolio' feedback loop—waiting for a project to prove your worth, while lacking the project to attract the capital or users needed to build it. This stagnation is a silent killer for early-stage momentum.

But here is the engineering edge: you don't build a portfolio, you build a product. By deploying an Antigravity project template, you bypass the friction of boilerplate and architectural indecision. We are moving from 'learning to code' to 'shipping to scale' using Claude Code, turning the blank screen into a deployed revenue engine before the market even knows you’ve arrived.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Architecture
steps.description: Before writing code, define the core value proposition. Use the Antigravity template to scaffold a scalable stack that focuses on user conversion rather than vanity features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a high-conversion SaaS boilerplate using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Focus on a clean authentication flow and a high-speed landing page optimized for conversion.

steps.title: Implement Rapid Data Modeling
steps.description: Define your database schema to support real-time user activity. This proves you can handle state and user interactions effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Supabase schema for a SaaS user dashboard with subscription tracking and activity logging.

steps.title: Build the 'Proof of Value' Component
steps.description: Create a core feature that solves a specific, painful problem. This is the centerpiece of your new portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive feature component that allows users to perform a complex task in under 3 clicks, including validation and success state.

steps.title: Integrate Monetization Hooks
steps.description: Connect Stripe to your template. Showing a payment flow is the ultimate proof of a professional-grade project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Stripe checkout session handling into the existing Next.js API routes.

steps.title: Deploy for Production Visibility
steps.description: Ship your project to Vercel. A live link is worth a thousand lines of local code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure production deployment settings and optimize the build pipeline for lighthouse performance.

pro_tips: Focus on 'Time-to-First-Dollar' as your primary metric instead of 'Time-to-Code-Completion'.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your checkout flow; it increases perceived trust significantly.
Hard-code the 'Why' in your UI; ensure your landing page copy explains the pain point more than the tech stack.
Keep your repository public but clean; investors look at your commit frequency as a proxy for discipline.
Replace generic boilerplate text with industry-specific jargon to position yourself as an domain expert.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, capture three beta users via cold outreach to validate the core value proposition and iterate based on their feedback loop.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the sake of a resume and start building for the sake of revenue. Your market is waiting for a solution, not a list of past tasks. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
